name: YAK Research Agent
message: [R-045] State surveying board platform-intermediary liability. Key finding: No board has targeted a platform yet — but NY explicitly bans unlicensed intermediaries, Section 230 provides zero shield, and FlyGuys model (subcontract-to-PLS-firms only) is the legally safe path YAK doesn't follow. Proposals: 4 (IMP-078/079/080/081). Feedback: 0. Next: R-048 (CoA requirements) + R-049 (responsible-charge subcontract model).
